description: Official TeachAny courseware registry - 8 demo coursewares for Skill reference (Math×2, Biology, History, Physics, Geography, Chemistry, Chinese)

courses.name: 二次函数 y=ax²+bx+c
courses.subject: math
courses.description: Complete interactive courseware for quadratic functions. Canvas graphing, vertex dragging, step-by-step completing the square, and per-option error diagnosis.
courses.description_zh: 九年级上册二次函数完整互动课件。Canvas 绘图、顶点拖拽、配方法逐步推导、逐选项错因诊断。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 一次函数
courses.subject: math
courses.description: Grade 8 linear function courseware with Canvas graphing, k/b sliders, step-by-step undetermined coefficient method, three-level scaffolding, and 4 TTS narration segments.
courses.description_zh: 八年级一次函数互动课件。Canvas 绘图、k/b 滑块实时探索、待定系数法逐步推导、三级脚手架练习、4 段 TTS 语音讲解。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 光合作用
courses.subject: biology
courses.description: Interactive Grade 7 Biology courseware on photosynthesis. Canvas animation, drag-and-drop equation building, chloroplast structure labeling. 12 AI narration segments with subtitles.
courses.description_zh: 七年级生物互动课件，涵盖光合作用定义、方程式、三大条件、叶绿体结构，Canvas 动画 + 拖拽排序 + 12 段 TTS 语音讲解。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 秦汉统一多民族国家
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Interactive courseware for Qin-Han unification. MapLibre historical map, SVG life scenes, Canvas experiments, D3.js knowledge graph, and comprehensive quizzes.
courses.description_zh: 七年级上册第3单元秦汉大一统互动课件。MapLibre 历史地图、SVG 生活场景、Canvas 实验、D3.js 知识图谱、完整练习题。
courses.author: TeachAny

courses.name: 压强
courses.subject: physics
courses.description: Grade 8 physics: solid pressure (p=F/S), liquid pressure (p=ρgh), communicating vessels. 3 Canvas experiments with HiDPI, 14 diagnostic quiz questions.
courses.description_zh: 八年级物理压强互动课件。固体压强p=F/S、液体压强p=ρgh、连通器原理。3个Canvas交互实验，14道诊断式测评。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 全球季风系统
courses.subject: geography
courses.description: Explore monsoon systems on an interactive Leaflet map. Wind pattern visualization, summer/winter toggle, East Asian vs. South Asian monsoon comparison.
courses.description_zh: 在交互式 Leaflet 地图上探索季风系统。风向可视化、夏冬切换、东亚与南亚季风对比。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 元素周期表
courses.subject: chemistry
courses.description: Grade 9 chemistry interactive courseware. Interactive periodic table, period/group navigation, same-group similarity, same-period trends, property prediction with three-level scaffolding.
courses.description_zh: 九年级化学互动课件。交互式元素周期表、周期与族定位、同族相似与同周期递变、性质预测三级脚手架练习、4 段 TTS 语音讲解。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 复韵母乐园
courses.subject: chinese
courses.description: Grade 1 Chinese Pinyin courseware on compound vowels (ai/ei/ui/ao/ou/iu/ie/üe/er). Interactive learning with games and pronunciation exercises.
courses.description_zh: 一年级语文拼音课件,涵盖复韵母ai/ei/ui/ao/ou/iu/ie/üe/er的发音与书写,通过互动游戏和练习帮助学生掌握复韵母。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 氧化还原反应
courses.subject: chemistry
courses.description: High school chemistry courseware on oxidation-reduction reactions. Features Canvas electron transfer animation, ABT narrative, valence change game, layered exercises (Level 1-3), and pre/post-test with auto-scoring.
courses.description_zh: 高中化学必修一氧化还原反应互动课件。含 Canvas 电子转移动画、ABT 叙事导入、化合价判断游戏、分层练习（含歧化反应）、前后测自动评分。
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 朝花夕拾 · 名著导读
courses.subject: chinese
courses.description: Interactive courseware for Lu Xun's only memoir essay collection — dual-perspective reading method.
courses.description_zh: 初中七年级语文名著导读：朝花夕拾 — 十篇散文速览、人物画廊、核心手法、双视角叙事、批注实战
courses.author: weponusa

courses.name: 三国两晋南北朝至隋唐
courses.name_en: Three Kingdoms, Jin, Southern & Northern Dynasties to Sui-Tang
courses.subject: history
courses.description: Interactive courseware on the critical transition from Three Kingdoms to Sui-Tang. Timeline-based thematic approach with causal chain analysis.
courses.description_zh: 初中历史主题型互动课件：三国两晋南北朝至隋唐 — 朝代更替时间线拖拽排序、隋统一条件分析、贞观之治内容、史料分析题
courses.author: weponusa

courses.title: There be 句型
courses.subject: english
courses.description: 小学英语 There be 句型互动课件，涵盖 there is/are 用法、肯定否定疑问句变换、方位介词搭配等核心知识点。
courses.name: There be 句型
